requirement_topic.en: OCPP, Smart-Charger Communication, and IEC 61000 EMC

summary.en: For Guatemala networked chargers, OCPP is best treated as a charge-point-operator or tender interoperability requirement rather than a universally confirmed CNEE product mandate. Public, fleet, or commercial deployments may require remote monitoring, authentication, tariff or billing integration, load management, fault reporting, and site commissioning with a back-office platform. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared against IEC 61000-family standards and any CNEE or distributor limits for harmonic injection, voltage disturbance, immunity, and emissions.
summary.zh: 对于危地马拉联网充电桩，OCPP更应视为充电点运营商或招标互操作要求，而非已普遍确认的CNEE产品强制规定。公共、车队或商业部署可能要求远程监控、身份认证、资费或计费集成、负载管理、故障报告，以及与后台平台的现场调试。EMC和电能质量证据应依据IEC 61000系列标准及任何CNEE或配电商关于谐波注入、电压扰动、抗扰度和发射的限值准备。
summary.zht: 對於瓜地馬拉聯網充電樁，OCPP更應視為充電點運營商或招標互操作要求，而非已普遍確認的CNEE產品強制規定。公共、車隊或商業部署可能要求遠程監控、身份認證、資費或計費集成、負載管理、故障報告，以及與後台平台的現場調試。EMC和電能質量證據應依據IEC 61000系列標準及任何CNEE或配電商關於諧波注入、電壓擾動、抗擾度和發射的限值準備。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility, emissions, immunity, harmonics, and power quality
IEC 61851-21-2 — EMC requirements for off-board electric vehicle charging systems
OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked charger back-office integration where specified
CNEE and distributor power-quality requirements for grid-connected equipment

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly implement GB/T 27930-2023 between the off-board charger and the vehicle battery management system. Back-office communication may be proprietary or OCPP depending on the Chinese operator. China EMC evidence and GB/T 27930 communication do not automatically satisfy a Guatemala CPO's OCPP backend requirements, IEC 61000 reports, or distributor power-quality review.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常在非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间实施GB/T 27930-2023。后台通信可因中国运营商不同而采用私有协议或OCPP。中国EMC证据和GB/T 27930通信不能自动满足危地马拉充电点运营商的OCPP后台要求、IEC 61000报告或配电商电能质量审查。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常在非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間實施GB/T 27930-2023。後台通訊可因中國運營商不同而採用私有協議或OCPP。中國EMC證據和GB/T 27930通訊不能自動滿足瓜地馬拉充電點運營商的OCPP後台要求、IEC 61000報告或配電商電能質量審查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China EMC and power-quality requirements applicable to domestic charger deployment

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the OCPP version, security profile, SIM or network requirements, backend certification test cases, billing integration, and load-management functions required by the Guatemala CPO or tender. Separately, prepare IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2 EMC evidence, harmonic data, immunity reports, and mitigation design for the distributor. A charger that only supports GB/T 27930 vehicle communication or a China-only backend cannot be assumed interoperable with Guatemala network operators.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认危地马拉充电点运营商或招标要求的OCPP版本、安全配置、SIM或网络要求、后台认证测试用例、计费集成和负载管理功能。另需为配电商准备IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2 EMC证据、谐波数据、抗扰度报告及抑制设计。仅支持GB/T 27930车辆通信或中国国内后台的充电桩，不能假定可与危地马拉网络运营商互操作。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認瓜地馬拉充電點運營商或招標要求的OCPP版本、安全配置、SIM或網絡要求、後台認證測試用例、計費集成和負載管理功能。另需為配電商準備IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2 EMC證據、諧波數據、抗擾度報告及抑制設計。僅支持GB/T 27930車輛通訊或中國國內後台的充電樁，不能假定可與瓜地馬拉網絡運營商互操作。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — OCPP is mandatory where required by the CPO, tender, fleet owner, or network platform; EMC and power-quality evidence is a practical requirement for distributor acceptance and conformity review
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not an OCPP backend substitute and does not replace IEC 61000 EMC evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Guatemala, separate vehicle-side charging communication from network-side OCPP integration and EMC evidence. Confirm OCPP with the operator, and confirm IEC 61000 / power-quality evidence with the distributor or project reviewer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向危地马拉时，应区分车辆侧充电通信、网络侧OCPP集成和EMC证据。OCPP应向运营商确认，IEC 61000 / 电能质量证据应向配电商或项目审查方确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向瓜地馬拉時，應區分車輛側充電通訊、網絡側OCPP集成和EMC證據。OCPP應向運營商確認，IEC 61000 / 電能質量證據應向配電商或項目審查方確認。
